dublinCore.dc:title: 119 S4092 IS: No Crypto in Social Security Act
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

form.current-chamber: IN THE SENATE OF THE UNITED STATES

action.action-desc: Mr. Durbin introduced the following bill; which was read twice and referred to the Committee on Finance

form.official-title: To amend the Social Security Act to prohibit the Social Security Trust Funds from investing in cryptocurrency.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the No Crypto in Social Security Act.

section.header: Prohibit Social Security Trust Funds from investing in cryptocurrency
section.text: Section 201 of the Social Security Act (42 U.S.C. 401) is amended—

paragraph.text: in subsection (d), by inserting after the second sentence the following: Such investment may not be made in any digital asset or any crypto-related investment.; and
by adding at the end the following new subsection:
the term digital asset has the same meaning given such term in section 2 of the GENIUS Act (12 U.S.C. 5901); and

subparagraph.text: any investment fund under the Investment Company Act of 1940 (15 U.S.C. 80a–1 et seq.) related to futures on digital assets (as so defined) or on digital asset indices;
any stock or bond of a public company that—

clause.text: substantially derives its value from holdings of digital assets; or
primarily derives revenue from providing products or services (including issuance, trading, management, distribution, custody, settlement, or similar services) related to digital assets; or

subparagraph.text: any other asset or investment whose value is tied to, or derived from, digital assets.
